source_pr.title: show import: fix show import might read data from prev line
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #42930

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?
- check `isNull` before get it, else we might got data of prev row

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: No concrete flaky failure signature recorded in the case data; PR fixes a deterministic show-import parsing issue and the captured signal is only BUILD race-mode metadata.
failure_signature: No concrete flaky signature recorded; deterministic bug fix with only BUILD race-mode metadata captured.
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR fixes SHOW IMPORT reading data from the previous line (a deterministic correctness bug) and adjusts BUILD metadata. The case data does not include a concrete flaky signature or a targeted stabilization; keep it as insufficient evidence rather than asserting a confirmed data race root cause.
fix_pattern: Fix deterministic SHOW IMPORT parsing/reading issue; no clearly evidenced anti-flake stabilization in the case.
analysis:
PR title: show import: fix show import might read data from prev line
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/44724
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal
Triage summary: race = "on",
Changed files (3): executor/importer/BUILD.bazel, executor/importer/job.go, executor/importer/job_test.go
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
